arts.sum: Sheffield Wednesday are considering Nottingham Forest’s Emmanuel Dennis as a target but a move to sign him would… The post Sheffield Wednesday consider tricky move for Nottingham Forest attacker appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Chelsea DEAL on as BlueCo wrap up Nottingham Forest signing
arts.sum: This deal has been potentially unlocked following the announcement from the Ligue 1 club that they have signed Andrew Omobamidele from Forest on loan. Chelsea’s sister club Strasbourg are key to the operation, with Mamadou Sarr set to depart Liam Rosenior’s side and hook up with the Blues on a permanent basis.

arts.ttl: 'Actively looking': Mikel Arteta drops hint over whether Arsenal will challenge Nottingham Forest for Matheus Cunha
arts.sum: He's not shying away from the rumours...

arts.ttl: “100% focused on Nottingham Forest” – Player doesn’t want to fuel drama too much, rather calm things down
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest attacker Anthony Elanga has told the Swedish media his focus at the moment is solely on playing for the Premier League side. The 22-year-old has been in impressive form recently, but has been experiencing issues with the Swedish national team. Speaking to Expression, the former Manchester United player was asked about his situation The post “100% focused on Nottingham Forest” – Player doesn’t want to fuel drama too much, rather calm things down appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest transfer one step closer as £16.5m star gives the green light, but there’s a catch
Barcelona keen on Nottingham Forest player – They’ll know how difficult deal is for them
arts.sum: Two months ago, we covered claims from Spain which stated Barcelona and Real Madrid are in the picture for Nottingham Forest’s Murillo. The centre-back is still at Nottingham Forest and earlier this week he signed a new deal until 2029. Despite the defender’s renewal, the Spanish media continues to push Barcelona as an interested party. The post Barcelona keen on Nottingham Forest player – They’ll know how difficult deal is for them appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Andoni Iraola interview: The reluctant coach leading a post-Pep tactical revolution
arts.sum: In an exclusive interview with The Independent’s chief football writer Miguel Delaney, the Bournemouth manager opens up on giving players freedom, his laidback persona and how to beat the Premier League giants
